title: More Nonsense Limerick 23
content:
There was an old man of Hong Kong,
    Who never did anything wrong;
    He lay on his back, 
    With his head in a sack,
    That innocuous old man of Hong Kong.
meaning:
"More Nonsense Limerick 23" is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
